content.en:
"Finally a half-step true spirit!"

Zero muttered.

He felt that he was much stronger now than before, and he had also succeeded in condensing the Supreme True Spirit, but it was not a perfect Supreme True Spirit, and it seemed to be a little broken.

But this kind of true spirit must have surpassed the supreme true spirit, but it has not reached the level of the true supreme true spirit, if there is a level to describe it, it can be called a half-step supreme true spirit.

"It's strange, I was also promoted as a nine-star peak god general, and now I have cultivated the three aspects of divine soul, chaos divine power, and physical body to the extreme, and I have practiced many chaotic divine powers, and all of them have reached the limit level. This is already the real limit, why hasn't the true Supreme True Spirit been condensed yet, could it be that there is no Supreme True Spirit in the chaos at all?"

Zero felt very strange, and he was still a little unwilling in his heart.

When he was soon relaxed again!

"Maybe that's the way the supreme true spirit rumored by the outside world is, after all, I've reached the true limit, and I don't think anyone can accumulate deeper than me!"

It's a pity that he didn't pay attention to the Heavenly Monarch List at all, if he did, he should know that when he hadn't become a half-step True Spirit, his ranking on the Heavenly Monarch List had been surpassed by Ye Tian, and he had surpassed it a long time ago.

If he knew, he should know that his strength at the time of the Heavenly Monarch was far inferior to the current Ye Tian.

At that time, he may have completely doubted life, and he will be even more unwilling.

"It's time to kill the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, but after all, he is the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven One Line, I have no background, if I kill the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son on the surface, the Void Heaven One Pulse will not be able to help me for the time being, but in the future, I am afraid that I will have to bear the attack of the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven One Line, or even the Dao Ancestor!"

Zero thought.

Of course, he can also choose to join a faction, so there is no need to be afraid of the Void Sky Pulse.

But he didn't bother to join a faction, and he also obtained the inheritance of a Dao Ancestor, and all he lacked was resources.

Besides, he doesn't have a good impression of the so-called big forces at all.

"If you can't kill it openly, then assassinate it!"

Zero decided.

He also knew that Ye Tian had the Great Realm Movement and his life-saving ability was also very strong, but he was definitely not invincible.

No matter what kind of means of preserving life, once you cross the boundary, you will definitely die.

He is very confident in his own strength, and has mastered a number of extreme level Chaos Divine Powers, and the strongest offensive Chaos Divine Power is the Blood Demon Collapse Technique, which is ranked 90th on the Chaos Divine Power List.

Once this Chaos Divine Power is cast, the speed is incomparably fast, directly destroying the enemy's body and soul, as long as the opponent has the slightest flaw, it is difficult to block this Chaos Divine Power.

With his half-step True Spirit Realm cultivation, even if it was some True Monarch, he could kill it with one blow.

Killing a Celestial Monarch, he felt that there was no problem.

It can be said that looking at the current universe, he ignores anyone, no one can be his opponent, and he can kill whoever he wants.

rampant, that's his current state!

If it weren't for the fear of those True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors in the chaos, he would even want to dominate the Great Universe.

Wow!

Zero shuttled away, preparing to go to the territory where the Void Heaven Temple was located.

......

After Ye Tianxuan's Void Secret Heavenly Mandate Chapter was completed, he continued to use various rare resources to refine his body, soul, and chaotic divine power, and even continued to expand his internal universe.

Without lacking resources, he wants to push all aspects of himself to the limit level.

In addition, other Chaos Divine Powers were also cultivated one by one.

He found that the more chaotic divine powers he cultivated, the higher the realm, and there was a certain improvement in potential, although it was not much, but at least it was also a kind of foundation, and it had extremely high benefits for impacting the half-step true spirit realm.

Moreover, after the Chaos Divine Power reaches the limit level, it will have a certain improvement in the prototype of the Great Dao, and the prototype of the Great Dao will grow rapidly.

This was also something that Ye Tian only learned after cultivating the first Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level.

In fact, many Heavenly Monarchs didn't know about it, because many Heavenly Monarchs didn't have the opportunity to cultivate a Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level, and they might not even be able to reach the Consummation Realm.

In addition, Ye Tian did not receive the personal guidance of Dao Ancestor, and many of his cultivation was on his own, so he was not very clear.

Ever since he knew that the Chaos Divine Power was directly related to the growth of the Great Dao Prototype, he had spent time cultivating a Sect Chaos Divine Power to the extreme level.

Under such circumstances, the prototype of Ye Tian's avenue is getting longer and longer.

From 5,000 meters to 6,000 meters, 7,000 meters......

Gradually, Ye Tian's Great Dao Formation grew to tens of thousands of meters away!

The prototype of other people's avenues is only 100 meters wide or 200 meters wide, but the prototype of Ye Tian's avenue has reached more than 10,000 meters away, and Ye Tian can continue to condense the prototype of the avenue, and his endless avenue can be almost infinitely widened, which is a skill that others do not have.

Therefore, the prototype of the avenue that was 10,000 meters away in Ye Tian was even more powerful than the prototype of the avenue that was tens of thousands of meters away from others, and even more powerful than a consummation avenue.

The Avenue is only 100,000 meters, and the width is only 100 meters.

Of course, Ye Tian had never seen the true consummation avenue, so he naturally didn't know the power in it.

Millions of years!

Two million years!

Three million years!

......

Ye Tian has been in retreat and cultivating, but Zero, who has been secretly squatting, is a little urgent.

He had been waiting for a long time, and if he continued to wait, it would even delay his cultivation.

He has only just stepped into the half-step True Spirit Realm, and the next step is to continuously integrate the True Spirit and the physical body, and only when he reaches a tenth-percent fusion degree can he undergo a transformation and be promoted to the True Spirit Realm, thus becoming a True Monarch.

However, the transition of fusion is very long, and most of the half-step True Spirit powerhouses are in retreat and fusion, looking forward to completing the transformation as soon as possible and advancing to the True Spirit Realm.

Moreover, the half-step true spirit realm did not dare to let the physical body be hit hard, otherwise it would be difficult to progress for a long time, which was also the reason why the half-step true spirit rarely appeared.

At the beginning, the reason why the half-step true spirit of the Demon Sound Sect appeared was because of Xingchen Crystal, they had to kill Ye Tian at all costs, otherwise the half-step true spirit of the Demon Sound Sect would not appear.

Zero is now preparing to kill Ye Tian with one blow, so he will completely hide, and wait until he breaks through the True Spirit Realm before choosing to be born.

But I didn't expect him to wait so long!

"Won't the Ten Thousand Dharma Daozi come out for a walk? I heard that he hasn't been cultivating for a long time, so logically speaking, this kind of newcomer Heavenly Monarch's one-time retreat won't be too long!"

Zero thought depressedly.
